response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the song titles provided in the JSON, but the performer's spoken commentary diverges from the provided lyrics reference as she is talking over the music. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON was used to identify song titles and context, but the transcription is 100% manual for Flare's commentary. 3. Timing & Pacing: Flare speaks rapidly during the rhythm game and results screens; aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions were used to maintain synchronization with her speech patterns.

subtitles.original: Right now, what's your way!
subtitles.english: Right now, what's your way!

subtitles.original: この曲も
subtitles.english: This song too...

subtitles.original: 歌いたかったですね
subtitles.english: ...is one I wanted to sing.

subtitles.original: もしまた何か機会があったら
subtitles.english: If there is another chance,

subtitles.original: 歌わせてください
subtitles.english: please let me sing it.

subtitles.original: どうしてもちょっと後半がグズグズになってしまう
subtitles.english: The second half always ends up becoming a mess.

subtitles.original: あー神曲！
subtitles.english: Ah, a god-tier song!

subtitles.original: ここがきつい！
subtitles.english: This part is tough!

subtitles.original: あー、なんか取れたかな？大丈夫かな？
subtitles.english: Ah, did I get something? Is it okay?

subtitles.original: あー、一番、フレアが一番好きな曲です
subtitles.english: Ah, this is Flare's number one favorite song.

subtitles.original: これで「音」と読みます
subtitles.english: This character is read as 'Oto' (Sound).

subtitles.original: あー大好き
subtitles.english: Ah, I love it.

subtitles.original: あの、推しです
subtitles.english: He's my favorite.

subtitles.original: 推しのMZDさんです、これどちらも
subtitles.english: It's my favorite, MZD, in both of these.

subtitles.original: 今日はですね、あの、選ぶ3曲のうちの2曲が
subtitles.english: So today, two out of the three songs I chose...

subtitles.original: ちょっとMZDの曲なんですけど
subtitles.english: ...are actually MZD songs.

subtitles.original: どうしてもみんなとやりたかったやつもあって
subtitles.english: But there was one I really wanted to do with everyone,

subtitles.original: ちょっとそれ最後にしたいなと思ったんで、ちょっとMZDで挟んじゃうんですけど
subtitles.english: so I'll do that last, and sandwich it between MZD songs.

subtitles.original: 今回ちょっとライブでは歌わないのですが
subtitles.english: I won't be singing this one at the live show today, but...

subtitles.original: やはりね、あの、ポップンといえばの中で、結構ナデシコロックじゃないかっていう方も
subtitles.english: ...when you think of Pop'n, many of you would say Nadeshiko Rock is the one,

subtitles.original: たくさんいらっしゃったので
subtitles.english: and since there were so many requests,

subtitles.original: ちょっとナデシコロックを叩かせていただこうかと思います
subtitles.english: I thought I'd play Nadeshiko Rock.

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします
subtitles.english: Please enjoy.

subtitles.original: オッケー！
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: 凛として咲く花の如く
subtitles.english: Rin toshite Saku Hana no Gotoku

subtitles.original: Are you ready?
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: 譜面もいいですからね
subtitles.english: The chart is great too.

subtitles.original: みんなの一番いい曲のひとつですね
subtitles.english: It's one of everyone's favorite songs.

subtitles.original: 一番いい曲なんてなんぼあったっていいですからね
subtitles.english: You can never have too many 'best' songs.

subtitles.original: フレア今日何回一番いい曲のひとつって言ってるでしょう
subtitles.english: I wonder how many times I've said 'one of the best' today.

subtitles.original: 口癖みたいに言ってると思います
subtitles.english: I think it's becoming a habit.

subtitles.original: フレア、エルフレにもたくさん知ってもらいたいんですよね
subtitles.english: Flare wants the Elfriends to know about them too.

subtitles.original: コナミさんの神曲にはたくさんいい曲があるということを
subtitles.english: That there are so many god-tier songs from Konami.

subtitles.original: ジャンジャン、ジャンジャンジャン
subtitles.english: Janjan, janjanjan.

subtitles.original: SE歌いがち
subtitles.english: I tend to sing the sound effects.

subtitles.original: ここがね、この後！
subtitles.english: This part, right after this!

subtitles.original: こういうところ好きですよね
subtitles.english: I love parts like this.

subtitles.original: いい曲であり譜面もいい
subtitles.english: It's a great song and a great chart.

subtitles.original: ちょっとなんかお馬さんパカパカみたいな感じで
subtitles.english: It's like a horse going clip-clop.

subtitles.original: ここ楽しいですよね
subtitles.english: This part is fun.

subtitles.original: ということで、ギリギリ、スコアが9万点いかないみたいな
subtitles.english: So, just barely, the score didn't reach 90,000.

subtitles.original: これちょっと悔しいですね
subtitles.english: That's a bit frustrating.

subtitles.original: はい、凛として咲く花の如く、アニューレコードだそうで
subtitles.english: Yes, 'Rin toshite Saku Hana no Gotoku', apparently a new record.

subtitles.original: これ自分のカード、マイカードなので
subtitles.english: This is my card, my own card.

subtitles.original: はい、ニューレコードだそうです。配信バフなんでしょうか。ありがとうございました
subtitles.english: Yes, a new record. Must be the stream buff. Thank you!

subtitles.original: 最後はですね、みんなでどうしても叫びたかったあの曲といったら二択だと思うんですけど
subtitles.english: Finally, when it comes to that song we all really want to shout along to...

subtitles.original: ちょっとどうしてもみんなと叫びたい
subtitles.english: ...I really want to shout with everyone.

subtitles.original: ハンズアップに決まってるじゃないですか！
subtitles.english: It's gotta be Hands Up, obviously!

subtitles.original: これ知らない方はね、カウントの後、カウントあります。4, 3, 2, 1で
subtitles.english: For those who don't know, there's a count. At 4, 3, 2, 1...

subtitles.original: サンバイスクリームなので
subtitles.english: ...it's 'Sun-by-ice-cream!'

subtitles.original: 皆さんで叫びましょう
subtitles.english: Let's all shout together.

subtitles.original: 叫べるかな？ちょっと45だけどこれ45じゃないんじゃないかっていうか最後がすごく難しいですよね
subtitles.english: I wonder if we can do it? It's level 45, but feels higher. The ending is so hard.

subtitles.original: 最後落としたらごめんなさい
subtitles.english: Sorry if I fail at the end.
